title: Naturally Not-Self
text:
## 2. About Māra (2nd)

At Sāvatthī. Seated to one side, Venerable Rādha said to the Buddha: “Sir, they speak of this thing called ‘liable to not-self’. What is liable to not-self?” “Rādha, form, feeling, perception, choices, and consciousness are liable to not-self. Seeing this … They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
